page_content:
Restriction: Permission of CMNS-Astronomy department.

Credit Only Granted for. ASTR635 or ASTR688E.

Formerly: ASTR688E.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 491

ASTR670 Interstellar Medium and Gas Dynamics (3 Credits) Content of phases of the interstellar medium: physical processes in the ISM: ionization equilibrium, heating and cooling, interstellar dust; gas dynamics: fluid motions, instabilities, shock waves; magnetohydrodynamics.
